search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` EventCode=643 OR EventCode=4739 | rex field=Message "Domain Policy Changed:\s(?<msg>.*)" | eval finalmsg=coalesce(msg,Change_Type,DomainPolicyChanged) | eval finaldomain=coalesce(Caller_Domain,Domain_Name,SubjectDomainName) | table _time host finalmsg finaldomain | rename _time AS Time host AS Server finalmsg AS "Policy change" finaldomain AS "Windows Domain" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time) | fillnull value="-" "Policy change", "Windows Domain"

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=517" OR "EventCode=1102") | search host=$Host_del$ | eval msg="The audit log was cleared." | convert timeformat=" %H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(_time) | table _time host msg | rename _time as Time host as Hostname msg as Message

`windowsindex` source="*WinEventLog:System" EventCode=1074 SourceName="USER32" | rex field=Message "The process.(?<process>[^ ]+)" | transaction host maxspan=5m | eval user_count=mvcount(User) | eval final_user=case(user_count == 1, User, user_count > 1, mvindex(User, user_count-1)) | eval process_count=mvcount(process) | eval final_process=case(process_count == 1, process, process_count > 1, mvindex(process, process_count-1)) | search host="$Host_res$" final_user="$Username_restart$" | table _time host final_user final_process | rename _time AS Time | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time) | rename final_user AS Username | rename final_process AS "Process name"

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` NOT (Subject_Account_Name = SYSTEM OR SubjectUserName = SYSTEM) ( EventCode=601 OR EventCode=4697 ) | search host="$Host_new_srv$" user="$Username_new_srv$" Service_Name="$ServiceName$" Service_File_Name="$ServiceFile$" | table _time host User Service_Name Service_File_Name | rename _time AS Time | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time) | rename User AS Username Service_Name AS "Service Name" Service_File_Name AS "Service File" host AS "Server" | fillnull value="-" Username
